headline: Stop gaining, start losing TODAY
summary: You're gaining 0.31 kg weekly when you need to lose 0.65 kg weekly; today you execute perfect eating and movement to reverse this bleeding before Friday hits.
details: Today: stick to Huel portions and vegan meals only—zero snacking, zero negotiation, no emotional eating. Do 30 minutes on the rowing machine this morning before work settles in. This single day of discipline prevents Friday's emotional eating from compounding your deficit; you're 33.1 kg away from 88 kg and every day you gain is a day you don't catch up.
